note: AI Engine page advanced to v0.22.0 with the new M22 (Research Frontier Map + Strategic Autonomy) section. Closes the 'agenda' gap: every recent hypothesis is grouped into research frontiers (ordered family rules: LDH / kesterite / antimony chalcogenide / oxysulfide / single-atom / PGM / phosphide / nitride / sulfide / layered oxide / ceramic), gaps in coverage are surfaced (many_ideas_no_evidence, evidence_no_exploration, recurring_contradictions, promising_no_validation, objective_uncovered), the next cycle's attention is split 40/30/20/10 across exploit/explore/falsify/review, and a weekly roadmap is rendered alongside an anti-obsession watchdog. Three new capability gates added (can_build_frontier_map, can_allocate_research_attention, can_write_roadmap) — true for materials/geaspirit/useful_compute only; false elsewhere. Canonical gate set is now seventeen wide; the hard locks (run_dft/publish/touch_consensus/execute_*) remain false for every project. Tests 1,302 / 1,302 green. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
